languages.text: "Абсурд! Исключено!" {n}Эоганн сканирует Триасомату, яростно колотя пальцами по клавишам микрокогитатора на торсе.{/n} "Вы преуспели в усмирении, но... Триасомата отвергает усилия машинных духов имплантов по сдерживанию энтропии когнитивных функций. Полный распад личности неминуем. Я... я должен собрать Триасомату заново!"

"Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

languages.text: «¡Absurdo! ¡Inaceptable!». {n}Eogunn examina al triasómata, aporreando las teclas del microcogitador engastado en su torso.{/n} «Ha logrado pacificarlo, pero... el triasómata rechaza los intentos de los espíritus máquina de los implantes por contener la entropía cognitiva. La degeneración total de su personalidad es inevitable. Debo... ¡debo volver a ensamblarlo!».
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Absurdo! ¡Inaceptable!». {n}Eogunn examina al triasómata, aporreando las teclas del microcogitador engastado en su torso.{/n} «Ha logrado pacificarlo, pero... el triasómata rechaza los intentos de los espíritus máquina de los implantes por contener la entropía cognitiva. La degeneración total de su personalidad es inevitable. Debo... ¡debo volver a ensamblarlo!».

languages.text: “荒谬至极！不可接受！”{n}伊奥贡一边扫描着三相体，一边愤怒地猛敲装在他躯干上的微型沉思者的按键。{/n}“您确实让他平静下来了，可是……三相体正在排斥植入物机魂对认知熵的压制。人格的彻底崩坏已不可避免。我……我必须重新组装他！”
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

traits.locale_text: “荒谬至极！不可接受！”{n}伊奥贡一边扫描着三相体，一边愤怒地猛敲装在他躯干上的微型沉思者的按键。{/n}“您确实让他平静下来了，可是……三相体正在排斥植入物机魂对认知熵的压制。人格的彻底崩坏已不可避免。我……我必须重新组装他！”

languages.text: « C'est incompréhensible ! Je refuse d'en rester là ! » {n}Eogunn ausculte le Triasomata, frappant rageusement les touches du microcogitateur implanté dans son torse.{/n} « Vous avez réussi à l'apaiser, mais... il rejette les tentatives des esprits de la machine des implants d'endiguer l'entropie cognitive. La dégradation totale de sa personnalité est inévitable. Je... je dois le réassembler ! »
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

traits.locale_text: « C'est incompréhensible ! Je refuse d'en rester là ! » {n}Eogunn ausculte le Triasomata, frappant rageusement les touches du microcogitateur implanté dans son torse.{/n} « Vous avez réussi à l'apaiser, mais... il rejette les tentatives des esprits de la machine des implants d'endiguer l'entropie cognitive. La dégradation totale de sa personnalité est inévitable. Je... je dois le réassembler ! »

languages.text: "Saçmalık! Kabul edilemez!" {n}Eogunn, gövdesine monte edilmiş mikro kavramsayarın tuşlarına öfkeyle basarak Üçkeyöz'ü tarıyor.{/n} "Sakinleşti ama... Üçyeköz, implantların makine ruhlarının bilişsel entropiyi kontrol altına alma girişimlerini reddediyor. Tam bir kişilik çöküşü kaçınılmaz. Ben... Onu yeniden birleştirmeliyim!"
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

Üçyeköz, implantların makine ruhlarının bilişsel entropiyi kontrol altına alma girişimlerini reddediyor. Tam bir kişilik çöküşü kaçınılmaz. Ben... Onu yeniden birleştirmeliyim!"

languages.text: 「ばかな！ 容認できません！」{n}エオガンはトリアソマタを走査しながら、胴に取り付けられたマイクロコギテーターのキーを猛然と叩く。{/n}「あなたは彼を鎮めることに成功した。しかし……トリアソマタは、認知エントロピーを封じ込めようとするインプラントの機械精霊の試みを、拒絶しています。完全な人格崩壊は避けられません。私が……私が彼を組み直さねば！」
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Unacceptable!" {n}Eogunn scans the Triasomata, furiously pounding the keys of the micro-cogitator mounted upon his torso.{/n} "You have succeeded in pacifying him, but... the Triasomata is rejecting the attempts of the implants' machine spirits to contain the cognitive entropy. Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

traits.locale_text: 「ばかな！ 容認できません！」{n}エオガンはトリアソマタを走査しながら、胴に取り付けられたマイクロコギテーターのキーを猛然と叩く。{/n}「あなたは彼を鎮めることに成功した。しかし……トリアソマタは、認知エントロピーを封じ込めようとするインプラントの機械精霊の試みを、拒絶しています。完全な人格崩壊は避けられません。私が……私が彼を組み直さねば！」

languages.text: "Absurd! Inakzeptabel!" {n}Eogunn scannt den Triasomata und schlägt wütend auf die Schlüssel des Mikrocogitators auf seinem Torso.{/n} "Ihr habt ihn besänftigt, aber ... der Triasomata verweigert den Maschinengeistern des Implantats die Aufnahme der kognitiven Entropie. Totale persönliche Degeneration ist unvermeidlich. Ich ... Ich muss ihn neu zusammensetzen!"
languages.original_text: "Absurd! Total personality degradation is inevitable. I... I must reassemble him!"

Totale persönliche Degeneration ist unvermeidlich. Ich ... Ich muss ihn neu zusammensetzen!"
